creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Thu Jul 18 05:22:02 2013
New Revision: 323197
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323197

Log:
  - Update to 2.3.0
  
  PR:		180582
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/databases/hsqldb/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/hsqldb/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/hsqldb/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/databases/hsqldb/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/hsqldb/Makefile	Thu Jul 18 05:20:29 2013	(r323196)
+++ head/databases/hsqldb/Makefile	Thu Jul 18 05:22:02 2013	(r323197)
@@ -2,9 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	hsqldb
-PORTVERSION=	2.2.9
+PORTVERSION=	2.3.0
 CATEGORIES=	databases java
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}_2_2
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}_2_3
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	An embeddable SQL database written in Java
@@ -21,9 +21,6 @@ ALL_TARGET=	hsqldb hsqljdbc
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
-pre-build:
-	${MKDIR} ${WRKSRC}/doc-src
-
 do-install:
 	@${ECHO_MSG} -n ">> Installing JAR files to ${JAVAJARDIR}..."
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/lib/hsqldb.jar \
